title: Exploring TabPFNv2 as a Novel Baseline for ADMET Prediction in Drug Discovery
description_es: Este trabajo explora el uso de TabPFNv2, un modelo foundation para datos tabulares, como método baseline para predicción de propiedades ADMET en el descubrimiento temprano de fármacos.
abstract: ADMET (Absorption, Distribution, Metabolism, Excretion, and Toxicity) prediction is crucial in early drug discovery. This work explores TabPFNv2, a foundation model for tabular data, as a novel baseline for ADMET prediction tasks. Our results demonstrate competitive performance with minimal hyperparameter tuning, establishing TabPFNv2 as a strong baseline for small-data drug discovery problems.

citations.apa: Ipas, O., Martín, I. S., Gomez-Trenado, G., Triguero, I., & Romero-Zaliz, R. (2025). Exploring TabPFNv2 as a Novel Baseline for ADMET Prediction in Drug Discovery. In XVIII Brazilian Symposium on Bioinformatics (BSB 2025).
citations.mla: Ipas, Oroel, et al. "Exploring TabPFNv2 as a Novel Baseline for ADMET Prediction in Drug Discovery." XVIII Brazilian Symposium on Bioinformatics (BSB 2025), 2025.
